designBrief.silhouette: workshop body with repair dish and manipulator arms — must read as support
designBrief.palette: dark ceramic with yellow/gold emissive accents
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi military vehicle hull texture sheet for a yellow faction mobile repair / logistics support in an alien RTS. Material: iridescent ceramic-alloy, energy lattice inlays. Palette: dark ceramic with yellow/gold emissive accents, with a subtle low-contrast camouflage pattern in the faction hue. Rich surface detail: riveted armor plates, weld seams, maintenance hatches and access panels, air intakes and cooling grilles, stowed spare parts (track links, tool boxes), strapped-down reserve fuel canisters, scuffed edges and oil stains. Alien design language: gyroscopic, energy lattice, floating segments, solar-forged. Faction markings as abstract glyphs and small stencil icons. Forbidden: weapons, siege barrels. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, flat orthographic texture-sheet depicting a sci-fi vehicle hull, entirely free of perspective, baked lighting, or text. The surface is composed of a dark, iridescent ceramic-alloy, engineered for a yellow mobile repair and logistics unit, showcasing a sophisticated alien industrial design. Intricate energy lattice inlays glow with vibrant yellow and gold emissive light, tracing complex, cryptic patterns across the hull's surface. Subtle, high-tech alien industrial surface details like interlocking plating, specialized vents, and utility ports are subtly etched into the material, maintaining a perfectly flat and unlit appearance suitable for PBR texturing.

Generate a seamless, unlit orthographic texture-sheet for a sci-fi vehicle hull, specifically for a yellow mobile repair/logistics support unit, with no perspective or textual elements. The material is a dark ceramic-alloy, exhibiting a deep iridescence, integrated with advanced alien industrial surface details that include geometric vents, modular panel lines, and subtly embossed, unknown glyphs. Luminous yellow and golden energy lattice inlays are embedded throughout the hull, acting as glowing conduits or diagnostic indicators, providing the primary emissive accents and conveying a high-tech, alien utility aesthetic suitable for a flat texture map.

Luminous yellow and golden energy lattice inlays are embedded throughout the hull, acting as glowing conduits or diagnostic indicators, providing the primary emissive accents and conveying a high-tech, alien utility aesthetic suitable for a flat texture map.
notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
